themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work.

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 1 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: שְׁלֹמֹ֥ה: he made Solomon - shelomah, david's successor

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 5 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: עָשִׂ֖יתִי: which I made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application

themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "וְלַמֻּרְבָּ֑כֶת: and for that which is fried - to soak (bread in oil)".
